name: Scheme Contract
description: Transaction metadata for confirmed scheme application contracts: government reference IDs, scheme authority outcome status, DPDP Act 2023 consent records, and UC2 external enrollment linkage.
privacy_notes: scr:governmentApplicationId is a sensitive government reference — do not expose in public indices.
scr:applicantConsentGiven and scr:consentTimestamp are DPDP Act consent records — retain per applicable data retention law (minimum 7 years for government scheme records).
scr:externalEnrollmentRef may contain an Aadhaar-derived or mobile-linked identifier — treat as sensitive PII.
Core Contract participant fields (name, contact) are applicant PII — handle per DPDP Act 2023.
